description_long: This is a pair of round-lensed eyeglasses with a full-rim metal frame featuring intricate, decorative engravings along the temples and hinges. The lenses are lightly tinted, offering a subtle greenish hue that provides a classic, vintage aesthetic. The bridge is a thin metal piece with adjustable nose pads for comfort and fit, and the temples are adorned with spring-like coil details and taper into black plastic tips for secure placement behind the ears. The overall design is both functional and ornamental, with a blend of retro and modern influences. The glasses appear lightweight and delicately constructed, suitable for everyday urban wear. No visible brand logo or insignia is present on any part of the frame.
description: Round-lensed eyeglasses with a detailed metal frame, light green-tinted lenses, and ornate temple engravings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round lenses, full-rim frame, and adjustable nose pads.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the engraved temples, spring coil detail, and black plastic temple tips.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curvature of the temples and the overall frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the temple engravings and spring detail, with clear visibility of the nose pads.
attribute_frame_design: The frame features a round geometry with a full-rim structure, medium thickness, and ornate engravings along the temples and hinges. The temples are straight with a slight curve at the ends and include spring-like coil embellishments.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses have a light green tint, are fully transparent, and do not display any mirrored or gradient effects.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a thin, straight metal piece with adjustable nose pads attached, providing both support and comfort.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are decorated with intricate engravings and a distinctive spring coil detail near the hinges, tapering into smooth black plastic tips.
